All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

T

TEXT - Static variable in class app.gui.style.AppColors
The standard baseline dark gray font paint applied across structural labels and input borders.
TimeSeriesRow - Interface in app.dto
Represents a standard, unified contract for any time-series data row within the system.
TitleLabel - Class in app.gui.components
A customized header title label that relies on FlatLaf semantics for consistent font scales.
TitleLabel(String, String) - Constructor for class app.gui.components.TitleLabel
Constructs a standardized title label component.
trainIsolationForest(List<FinancialIndicators>, int) - Method in class app.service.impl.anomalies.BaseFinancialIndicatorsAnomaliesDetectionService
Fits and builds an Isolation Forest mathematical dto configured with an optimized tree ceiling profile based on the size of the incoming collection and the given number of trees.
trainIsolationForest(List<FinancialIndicators>, int) - Method in class app.service.impl.anomalies.QuantumFinancialIndicatorsAnomaliesDetectionService
Trains an Isolation Forest over simulated quantum measurement probabilities instead of raw dimensional values.
trainIsolationForest(List<T>, int) - Method in interface app.service.AnomaliesDetectionService
Trains an Isolation Forest dto using the provided baseline context training dataset.
trainIsolationForest(List<T>, int) - Method in class app.service.impl.anomalies.BaseAnomaliesDetectionService
Fits and builds an Isolation Forest mathematical dto configured with an optimized tree ceiling profile based on the size of the incoming collection and the given number of trees.
trainIsolationForest(List<T>, int) - Method in class app.service.impl.anomalies.QuantumAnomaliesDetectionService
Trains an Isolation Forest over simulated quantum measurement probabilities instead of raw dimensional values.
